overall.description: A nighttime scene in a cyberpunk urban environment under a concrete overpass. A character with red hair plays a makeshift drum set on the sidewalk before standing up and walking away. The setting features neon lighting, passing vehicles, and sparse pedestrian traffic typical of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk under urban overpass with street performer setup

agents.ego_description: sitting on a concrete ledge playing a makeshift percussion drum set on cardboard

notable_agents.action: standing still near a green trash can facing the street

entered.detail: exposed concrete infrastructure with visible metal beams and pipes
illuminated vertical billboard displaying a portrait advertisement
large structural support column with tiled surface
metal barrier separating the sidewalk from the street traffic
public waste container with items next to it
makeshift drum kit consisting of buckets and metal pieces on cardboard

segments.scene_description: Under a concrete overpass at night, the ego sits playing a makeshift drum set on the sidewalk. The area is lit by artificial street lighting and a digital advertisement screen glows on the left pillar. A few pedestrians walk in the background beyond the metal railing, and an NPC stands near a trash can to the right. The camera remains stationary, capturing the street performance scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway transitioning to open street

events.description: ego stops playing drums, stands up from the concrete ledge, and begins walking forward

agents.ego_description: standing up from the drum performance spot and walking away from the overpass area

notable_agents.action: couple walking past the ego from right to left, moving through the covered area

entered.detail: tall buildings with glowing blue and yellow signage visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The ego stands up from the drum set and walks away from the performance spot, with the camera following from a third-person perspective. As the character moves forward, a couple walks past in the opposite direction. The drum set and advertisement screen are left behind as the view opens toward the distant neon-lit city buildings beyond the overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a transition from a static street performance under a concrete overpass to a moving perspective that opens up toward a neon-lit urban skyline. It begins with a stationary view of a red-haired character playing a makeshift drum set on the sidewalk, framed by a glowing digital advertisement on a pillar and pedestrians passing behind a metal railing. As the character stands up and begins to walk away, the camera shifts into a following motion, leaving the drums and the artificial street lighting behind. The scene then expands as the character moves forward, passing a couple walking in the opposite direction. Finally, the view opens beyond the confines of the overpass to reveal the distant, glowing buildings of the cyberpunk city.
